headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Amazon.com, TJX Companies, Eaton, Blue Ridge and Security Federal
summary: Amazon.com, TJX and Eaton lead Zacks' top stock reports, highlighting AI-driven growth, resilient retail demand and data center tailwinds.
